title: microservices-sim-poc: Worked examples, CLI runner, and reproducibility kit for CloudSim Plus-K8s
description: Runnable Kubernetes worked examples (org.cloudsimplus.examples.kubernetes) and a headless CLI runner, plus the RQ1-RQ4 and Online Boutique reproducibility kit (deployment captures, comparator scripts, and LaTeX paper sources), accompanying the paper "CloudSim Plus-K8s: A Contract-Driven Extension for Kubernetes Container Orchestration Simulation." Exercises the org.cloudsimplus.kubernetes extension (https://github.com/Othmane-zarai/cloudsimplus-k8s). Code is GPL-3.0-or-later; the empirical data and paper sources are CC-BY-4.0 (see LICENSE-DATA).
